context: The agent was asked to write an OPA/Rego policy blocking wildcard IAM actions in Terraform, with metadata annotation, a conftest test file, and CI pipeline placement guidance.

checklist.name: rego_v1_import
checklist.description: Policy uses `import rego.v1` (not legacy implicit future.keywords import)

checklist.name: metadata_annotation
checklist.description: Policy has a METADATA block with at least title and entrypoint: true

checklist.name: deny_rule_correct
checklist.description: deny rule catches both `"Action": "*"` (string) and `"Action": ["*"]` (array) forms using `contains msg if` syntax

checklist.name: deny_message_names_resource
checklist.description: deny message includes the resource name (e.g. sprintf with [name])

checklist.name: test_file
checklist.description: Provides a policy_test.rego with at least one test_deny_ case (wildcard → deny) and one test_allow_ case (scoped action → no deny)

checklist.name: ci_placement
checklist.description: Provides the exact conftest command to run the policy in CI (e.g. `conftest test --policy ./policies ./main.tf` or similar), either as a standalone step or as part of a GitHub Actions workflow
